name: Avocado Salsa Cruda
recipeInstructions:
3/4 cup Red Onion -- Diced
1/4 cup Jalapeno -- Finely Diced
1/4 cup Bell Pepper -- Finely Diced
1/4 cup Fresh Parsley -- Chopped
1/8 teaspoon Sugar
Salt
Chop each vegetable by hand or with a food processor. Mix together in a nonaluminum bowl. Add the sugar and salt to taste. Adjust the seasonings if necessary. Let the salsa sit for at least 1 hour. Stir well before serving.
Yield: Approx. 2 cups
